name: Centurion of Capernaum
oracleText:
Vigilance
When Centurion of Capernaum enters the battlefield, tap target creature an opponent controls. It doesn't untap during its controller's next untap step.
flavorText: "For I also am a man set under authority." — Luke 7:8
notes: Created from a checked Messianic Fulfillment card list item; first-pass mechanics were added. Source boundary is anchored to Luke with Matthew, Mark, and John as support material per the Biblical-series timeline guide. Classics theme art uses Unknown medieval artist's "Jesus and the Centurion in Capernaum" via Wikimedia Commons.
title: Man Under Authority
